memoryArtifacts.headline: Park Hall
memoryArtifacts.description: Descent: Sir John Botetourt, kt. sold 1373 to Sir Henry de Arden (d. c.1400), kt.; to son, Sir Ralph Arden (d. 1420), kt.; to son, Robert de Arden (d. 1452); to son, Walter Arden (d. 1502); to son, Sir John Arden (d. 1526), kt.; to son, Thomas Arden (d. 1563); to grandson, Edward Arden (d. 1583); forfeited to Crown and granted 1586 to Edward Darcy but in 1609 surrendered and returned to Robert Arden (d. 1635); to grandson, Robert Arden (d. 1643); to four sisters, from whom it was bought up by the husband of Godith Arden, Sir Herbert Price (fl. 1664); to son, John Price (fl. 1704); sold 1704 to John Bridgeman of Castle Bromwich Hall, with which it descended thereafter.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Arden於大約1346年出生在英國瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾時，他的父親Ralph de Arden58歲，母親Isabel Bromwich33歲。他於大約1371年與Elena Wetenhall在英國英格蘭藍卡爾帕克 霍爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1382年在他的家鄉享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: Arden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, either from the district of Arden in Warwickshire or from Arden in Bredbury (Cheshire). The first placename is thought to be derived from a Celtic word meaning ‘high place’, cognate with Ardennes, the name of a forested region on the borders between northeastern France and eastern Belgium. The second derives from Old English hēah ‘high’ + worthign ‘enclosed settlement’.

variants.name: Harden
meanings: English: variant of Arden with prosthetic H-.

English: habitational name, either from Haredene Wood in East Tisbury (Wiltshire), or from Haredon (in Ugborough, Devon). The first placename probably derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ + denu ‘valley’. The second is from Old English hara + dūn ‘hare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Arden was born about 1346, in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, his father, Ralph de Arden, was 58 and his mother, Isabel Bromwich, was 33. He married Elena Wetenhall about 1371, in Park Hall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1382, in his hometown, at the age of 37.

Il a épousé Elena Wetenhall environ 1371, à Park Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1382, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans.

Lui sposato Elena Wetenhall circa 1371, nel Park Hall, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1382, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Ardenが約1346年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアパークハルで生まれた時，父Ralph de Ardenは58歳，母Isabel Bromwichは33歳であった。約1371年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアパーク ハルでElena Wetenhallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1382年に故郷で37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Arden(이)가 대략 1346년 영국 워윅실르 박홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Arden(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Bromwich(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1371년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 박 홀에서 Elena Wetenhall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1382년 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Elena Wetenhall aproximadamente 1371, em Park Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Arden родился около 1346 г. в местности пархолл, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Arden было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Bromwich, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Elena Wetenhall около 1371 г. в местности парк холл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1382 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет.

Murió en 1382, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años.
